Source Reliability Indicators
Tier 1 — Wire services & flagship outlets
Reuters, AP, BBC, NYT, FT, Bloomberg, NPR, Al Jazeera
Tier 2 — Solid editorial reporting
Axios, Politico, CNBC, The Atlantic, Foreign Affairs
Tier 3 — Partisan, tabloid, or unverified
Opinionated outlets, aggregators, unknown sources
The % bar on clustered stories shows what share of sources covering that story are Tier 1 or 2. Applies to news sections only.

NUZU News is a news aggregation service. All article headlines link directly to original publisher sources. NUZU does not host or reproduce full article content. All quotes delayed a minimum of 15 minutes. All linked articles remain the property of their respective publishers. NUZU does not endorse any linked content.

How to set NUZU as your homepage:
Chrome: Settings → On startup → Open a specific page → Add https://nuzunews.github.io/
Firefox: Settings → Home → Homepage → Custom URLs → paste the URL above
Safari: Preferences → General → Homepage → paste the URL above
Edge: Settings → Start, home, and new tabs → Open these pages → Add the URL above
